articles.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.
articles.content: Google announced on Monday that the Gemini app is now offering its personalized Nano Banana-powered image generation feature to a broader audience. Starting today, all eligible users in the U.S. can … [+1865 chars]
